title: phragmites communis subsp. pseudodonax
intro: Phragmites communis subsp. pseudodonax is a type of plant also known as a type of grass, specifically a sub-species of the common reed (Phragmites australis). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phragmites communis subsp. pseudodonax include its ability to aid in wound healing, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
